PRISM
Properties • Rental • Income • Sales • Management
Features Pricing Contact
🚀 Multi-Tenant Business Management Platform

Manage Your Business
Like a Pro

PRISM gives your team a complete system for properties, rentals, credits, sales tracking, and more — all in one secure, offline-first platform.

🏠

Property Management

Track all your properties, occupancy status, and rental income in one organized dashboard.

👥

Tenant Tracking

Complete tenant profiles with payment history, signatures, photo IDs, and due date alerts.

💳

Credits & Loans

Manage lending with interest calculation, payment schedules, and automatic overdue detection.

💧

Water Station Sales

Run your water refilling business with customer accounts, credit sales, and balance tracking.

👷

Staff & Payroll

Manage employees, attendance, cash advances, and process payroll with ease.

📊

Reports & Analytics

AI-powered insights, 6-month trends, income vs expense charts, and CSV/PDF exports.

🔒

Secure & Private

Your organization's data is completely isolated. Multi-user access with role-based permissions.

📱

Offline-First PWA

Works without internet. Install on any device. Your data is always available, cloud sync optional.

🏢

Multi-Organization

Manage multiple businesses under one account. Perfect for business owners with multiple ventures.

Simple, Transparent Pricing

Choose the plan that fits your business. No hidden fees.

BASIC
₱299/month
For small businesses just getting started
  • Up to 3 users
  • All core modules
  • Offline capability
  • CSV export
  • Email support
MOST POPULAR
STANDARD
₱599/month
For growing businesses with teams
  • Up to 10 users
  • All modules + Reports
  • Cloud sync (Firebase)
  • PDF exports
  • Priority support
  • Multiple org support
ENTERPRISE
₱999/month
For large operations and franchises
  • Unlimited users
  • All modules + AI insights
  • Advanced cloud sync
  • Custom branding
  • Dedicated support
  • Multiple organizations
  • API access

    ☁️ Cloud Sync
    🔴 Offline

    📱 Offline Mode Active

    Cloud sync requires HTTPS. Your data is saved locally on this device.

    To enable cloud sync:
    • Upload to GitHub Pages, or
    • Use a local web server (localhost)

    Sign in to sync your data across all devices. Your data will be safely stored in the cloud.
